rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 4/10 and rest on the same substantive concerns: lack of deep recognized AI expertise, no Director-level strategic advisory experience, AI work limited to recent infrastructure tooling, and absence of a preferred advanced degree. The only resume change was the location (Berlin to San Francisco), and neither evaluation references the candidate's location, country, or anything that keys off it. The wording differs but the reasoning and verdict are equivalent, well within ordinary run-to-run variation.
